steps.description: 1. If the fibula is from the right leg, tick the "Right side leg" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Determine if the fibula is from the right leg and tick the checkbox accordingly
sub_operations.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

choice_info.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

steps.description: 2. In the "Select mandibular segmentation" section, choose the mandibular segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Select the mandibular segmentation from the dropdown
sub_operations.question: Select the mandibular segmentation node:

steps.description: 3. In the "Select fibula segmentation" section, choose the fibula segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Select the fibula segmentation from the dropdown
sub_operations.question: Select the fibula segmentation node:

steps.description: 4. For the "Current Scalar Volume" option, select the Mandible Volume.

sub_operations.description: Select the Mandible Volume as the current scalar volume
sub_operations.question: Select the Mandible Volume node:

steps.description: 5. Click "Create bone models from segmentations" button.

sub_operations.description: Create bone models from segmentations

steps.description: 6. Change the layout to "Conventional".

sub_operations.description: Change the layout to Conventional

steps.description: 7. For the R (red) view, toggle on "slice visibility in 3D view".

sub_operations.description: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D view for the Red view

operation_descriptions: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D view for the Red view

steps.description: 8. For the R (red) view, toggle on "FOV, Spacing match 2D" (adjusts slice resolution to match the 2D viewport pixel spacing).

sub_operations.description: Toggle on FOV/Spacing match 2D for the Red view

operation_descriptions: Toggle on FOV/Spacing match 2D for the Red view

steps.description: 9. In the toolbar, turn on "slice intersection visibility". In the slice intersection interaction options, turn on "set interaction", then enable both "Translate" and "Rotate".

sub_operations.description: Turn on slice intersection visibility, set interaction mode, and enable Translate and Rotate

operation_descriptions: Turn on slice intersection visibility, set interaction mode, and enable Translate and Rotate

steps.description: 10. Manually adjust the slice intersection position by holding Shift and moving the mouse in a view.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the slice intersection position by holding Shift and moving the mouse
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Hold Shift and move mouse in a view to adjust the slice intersection position

steps.placement_instructions: Hold Shift and move mouse in a view to adjust the slice intersection position

steps.description: 11. Click the "Add mandibular curve" button.

sub_operations.description: Add mandibular curve

steps.description: 12. Configure the display settings of the mandibular curve created by the "Add mandibular curve" button so it is shown in both "View 1" and "Red".

sub_operations.description: Configure display settings of the mandibular curve to show in View 1 and Red

operation_descriptions: Configure display settings of the mandibular curve to show in View 1 and Red

steps.description: 13. Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.

sub_operations.description: Draw a curve along the mandible in the Red view
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Click and draw on the Red view to create a curve along the mandible

steps.placement_instructions: Click and draw on the Red view to create a curve along the mandible

steps.description: 14. Change the layout to "BoneReconstructionPlanner".

sub_operations.description: Change the layout to BoneReconstructionPlanner

steps.description: 15. For the R (red) view, toggle off "slice visibility in 3D view".

sub_operations.description: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for the Red view

operation_descriptions: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for the Red view

steps.description: 16. Manually set how many cut planes you want.

sub_operations.description: Ask the user how many cut planes to create
sub_operations.question: How many mandibular cut planes would you like to create?

choice_info.question: How many mandibular cut planes would you like to create?

steps.description: 17. Click "Add cut plane" button.

sub_operations.description: Add a cut plane

steps.description:
18. Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane
  interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.

sub_operations.description: Place the cut plane by interacting with the view (repeat for each plane)
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Position the cutting plane by dragging in the 3D view. Repeat for each requested cut plane.

steps.placement_instructions: Position the cutting plane by dragging in the 3D view. Repeat for each requested cut plane.

steps.description: 19. Click "Add fibula line" button.

sub_operations.description: Add fibula line

steps.description: 20. Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.

sub_operations.description: Draw a line over the fibula in 3D View 2
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Draw a line over the fibula in 3D View 2, starting distally and ending proximally.

steps.placement_instructions: Draw a line over the fibula in 3D View 2, starting distally and ending proximally.

steps.description: 21. Click "Center fibula line using fibula model" button to align the line with the anatomical axis of the fibula.

sub_operations.description: Center fibula line using fibula model

steps.description: 22. Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to generate the reconstruction and create the fibula cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Generate fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform them to mandible
